name: did-tdw

metadata.name: did-tdw
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: This repository includes Python libraries for working with `did:tdw` (Trust DID Web) DID documents and the underlying log format.

documentation:
# Trust DID Web - Python

This repository includes Python libraries for working with `did:tdw` (Trust DID Web) DID documents and the underlying log format. Methods are provided for provisioning and updating DID documents as well as a resolving existing `did:tdw` DIDs. Currently, version 0.4 of [the specification](https://bcgov.github.io/trustdidweb/) is implemented.

## Prerequisites

This library requires Python 3.10 or later. Dependencies are listed in pyproject.toml and can be installed via:

```sh
poetry install
```

## Usage

A new `did:tdw` DID can be minted using the provision command. This will create a new Askar keystore for handling the signing key.

```sh
python3 -m did_tdw.provision --auto "domain.example"
```

This will output a new directory named after the new DID, containing `did.jsonl` (the DID log) and `did.json` (the current state of the document).

To automatically update the DID, edit `did.json` and execute the update command (use the identifier output from the provision command):

```sh
python3 -m did_tdw.update --auto "did:tdw:QmRwq46VkGuCEx4dyYxxexmig7Fwbqbm9AB73iKUAHjMZH:domain.example"
```

## DID Resolution

The resolver script may be invoked via the command line, and supports dereferencing of fragments and paths:

```sh
python3 -m did_tdw.resolver "did:tdw:QmRwq46VkGuCEx4dyYxxexmig7Fwbqbm9AB73iKUAHjMZH:domain.example"
```

```sh
python3 -m did_tdw.resolver "did:tdw:QmRwq46VkGuCEx4dyYxxexmig7Fwbqbm9AB73iKUAHjMZH:domain.example#key-1"
```

```sh
python3 -m did_tdw.resolver "did:tdw:QmRwq46VkGuCEx4dyYxxexmig7Fwbqbm9AB73iKUAHjMZH:domain.example/whois.vc"
```

For testing, this script also accepts the path to the local DID history file:

```sh
python3 -m did_tdw.resolver -f did.jsonl "did:tdw:QmRwq46VkGuCEx4dyYxxexmig7Fwbqbm9AB73iKUAHjMZH:domain.example"
```

## Demo

For demo purposes, a new DID can be minted along with a series of test updates applied using the included demo script:

```sh
python3 demo.py domain.example
```

## Contributing

Pull requests are welcome! Please read our [contributions guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md) and submit your PRs. We enforce [developer certificate of origin](https://developercertificate.org/) (DCO) commit signing — [guidance](https://github.com/apps/dco) on this is available. We also welcome issues submitted about problems you encounter in using Trust DID Web - Python.

## License

[Apache License Version 2.0](LICENSE)

modules.name: did_tdw.const
documentation: Constant values.

modules.name: did_tdw.provision
documentation: Provisioning of new did:tdw DIDs.

functions.name: did_tdw.provision.auto_provision_did
documentation:
Automatically provision a new did:tdw DID.

This will create a new Askar store for key management.

functions.name: did_tdw.provision.encode_verification_method
documentation: Format a verifiying key as a DID Document verification method.

functions.name: did_tdw.provision.genesis_document
documentation:
Generate a standard genesis document from a set of verification keys.

The exact format of this document may change over time.

functions.name: did_tdw.provision.provision_did
documentation:
Provision a new DID from an initial document state.

This does not create a new history file or add proof(s) to the state.

documentation: Domain and path handling for did:tdw identifiers.

methods.name: did_tdw.domain_path.DomainPath.parse_normalized
documentation: Parse a domain and path in normalized format (domain:port/path).

documentation: Parse a domain and path in identifier format (scid:domain%3Aport:path).

methods.name: did_tdw.domain_path.DomainPath.identifier
documentation: Convert into identifier format.

methods.name: did_tdw.domain_path.DomainPath.domain_port
documentation: Access the combined domain name and port in URL format.

methods.name: did_tdw.domain_path.DomainPath.__str__
documentation: Convert into normalized format.

methods.name: did_tdw.domain_path.DomainPath.validate
documentation: Validate the domain and path.
Domain and path (and port) compatible with a did:tdw identifier.

documentation: History file management.

functions.name: did_tdw.history.write_document_state
documentation: Append a new document state to a history log file.

functions.name: did_tdw.history.load_history_path
documentation: Load a history log file into a final document state and metadata.

functions.name: did_tdw.history.update_document_state
documentation: Update a document state, including a new signed proof.

modules.name: did_tdw.update
documentation: Update existing did:tdw DIDs.

functions.name: did_tdw.update.auto_update_did
documentation: Automatically update a history log.

functions.name: did_tdw.update.update_did
documentation: Update a history log, given a new document state and signing key.

modules.name: did_tdw.core.did_url
documentation: DID URL format handling.

classes.name: did_tdw.core.did_url.DIDUrl

methods.name: did_tdw.core.did_url.DIDUrl.root
documentation: Access this DID URL without any path, fragment, or query parameters.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.did_url.DIDUrl.decode
documentation:
Decode a string as a DID URL.

Raises:
    ValueError: on invalid inputs

methods.name: did_tdw.core.did_url.DIDUrl.did
documentation: Access the root DID identifier for this DID URL.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.did_url.DIDUrl.query_dict

A DID URL as defined by Decentralized Identifiers 1.0.

modules.name: did_tdw.resolver
documentation: Resolution of did:tdw DIDs.

functions.name: did_tdw.resolver.did_history_url
documentation: Determine the URL of the DID history file from a did:tdw DID URL.

functions.name: did_tdw.resolver.extend_document_services
documentation: Add the implicit services to a DID document, where not defined.

functions.name: did_tdw.resolver.resolve_did
documentation:
Resolve a did:tdw DID or DID URL.

Resolution parameters within a DID URL are not applied.

functions.name: did_tdw.resolver.resolve
documentation: Resolve a did:tdw DID URL, applying any included DID resolution parameters.

modules.name: did_tdw.core
documentation: DID log handling for did:tdw.

documentation: Hashing utilities and metadata.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.hash_utils.HashInfo.from_name
documentation: Resolve a hash descriptor from its unique identifier.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.hash_utils.HashInfo.identify_hash
documentation: Try to resolve a hash descriptor from a multihash-encoded hash.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.hash_utils.HashInfo.format_digest
documentation: Format a hash digest in the multihash encoding.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.hash_utils.HashInfo.formatted_hash
documentation: Hash a value and return the multihash encoding.
Descriptor for a hash method.

modules.name: did_tdw.core.loader
documentation: Methods to iterate through a DID log.

functions.name: did_tdw.core.loader.load_history
documentation:
Resolve a document state and metadata from an async log iterator.

Params:
    history: an async string iterator over ordered log lines
    version_id: stop parsing at the requested versionId
    version_time: stop parsing at the most recent entry before
        or exactly matching the requested versionTime
    verify_state: verification to perform on each intermediate state

functions.name: did_tdw.core.loader.iter_history
documentation:
Iterate through each intermediate state in a DID log.

Params:
    history: an async string iterator over ordered log lines
    version_id: stop parsing at the requested versionId
    version_time: stop parsing at the most recent entry before
        or exactly matching the requested versionTime
    verify_state: verification to perform on each intermediate state

modules.name: did_tdw.core.date_utils
documentation: Date-time handling utilities.

documentation: Convert a datetime to a string in ISO format.

functions.name: did_tdw.core.date_utils.make_timestamp
documentation: Convert from either a string or datetime value into a pair of both.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.initial
documentation: Create a new initial state for a DID (version 1).

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.check_version_id
documentation:
Verify the versionId of this entry.

Checks that the value is consistent with the version number
and entry hash.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.generate_next_key_hash
documentation:
Generate the hash value for an unrevealed multikey.

This value may be added to the `nextKeyHashes` parameter.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.create_next
documentation: Generate a successor document state from this state.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.load_history_line
documentation: Load a deserialized history line into a document state.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.history_line
documentation: Generate the serialized history line for this document state.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.document_id
documentation: Fetch the identifier of the DID document.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.deactivated
documentation: Fetch the `deactivated` flag from the parameters.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.document_copy
documentation: Fetch a copy of the DID document.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.controllers
documentation: Fetch a list of the controllers from the DID document.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.is_auth_event
documentation: Determine if this document state constitutes an authorization event.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.prerotation
documentation: Determine whether key prerotation is enabled for this document state.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.scid
documentation: Fetch the SCID of the DID document.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.update_keys
documentation: Fetch a list of the `updateKeys` entries from the parameters.

methods.name: did_tdw.core.state.DocumentState.next_key_hashes
documentation: Fetch a list of the `nextKeyHashes` entries from the parameters.
A state entry in a DID history log.

modules.name: did_tdw.core.resolver
documentation: Support for DID resolution.

functions.name: did_tdw.core.resolver.resolve_history
documentation:
Resolve a `ResolutionResult` from an async log iterator.

Params:
    document_id: the DID to be resolved
    history: an async string iterator over ordered log lines
    version_id: stop parsing at the requested versionId
    version_time: stop parsing at the most recent entry before
        or exactly matching the requested versionTime
    verify_state: verification to perform on each intermediate state

functions.name: did_tdw.core.resolver.reference_map
documentation: Collect identified fragments (#ids) in a DID Document.

functions.name: did_tdw.core.resolver.normalize_services
documentation: Normalize a `service` block to a list of dicts.

functions.name: did_tdw.core.resolver.dereference_fragment
documentation: Dereference a fragment identifier within a document.
